'''Skeck Draggle''' was the first mate of the ''[[Drunk Dancer]]''. He belonged to the same six-fingered, lanky, severe-faced [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Species/Legends|species]] as [[Archyr Beil]]. The ''[[Drunk Dancer]]''{{'s}} crew, which included captain [[Jula Shryne]], former [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Roan Shryne]], security-chief [[Archyr Beil]] and himself, were contacted by [[Cash Garrulan]] to smuggle former [[Senator/Legends|senator]] [[Fang Zar/Legends|Fang Zar]] of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]], to his homeplanet [[Sern Prime/Legends| Sern Prime]].<ref name="Rise" />
